chapter_title.ar: بَابُ فَصْلِ مَا بَيْنَ صَيْدِ الْبَرِّ وَ الْبَحْرِ وَ مَا يَحِلُّ لِلْمُحْرِمِ مِنْ ذَلِكَ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 112 – Difference between the prey of the land and the sea, and what is Permissible for the one in Ihraam from that

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل كالحسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (17/386)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل كالحسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (17/386)
text: مُحْرِمٍ قَتَلَ جَرَادَةً قَالَ يُطْعِمُ تَمْرَةً وَ التَّمْرَةُ خَيْرٌ مِنْ جَرَادَةٍ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Hammad, from Hareyz, from the one who informed him,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws regarding one in Ihraam killing a locust. Heasws said: ‘He should feed dates (to a poor one), and the date is better than a locust’.
en.sarwar: 4. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from Hammad from Hariz from those whom he has mentioned who has said the following: “About a man who kills a locust while in the state of Ihram, abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘He must feed a date (to a destitute person), even though a date is better than a locust.’”
